title: How Harvard Chooses Students
body: But remember, it doesn't matter where you go. You could end up at a job and some of your co-workers went to an expensive university, and some started out at community colleges. You can all end up in the same place with different paths to get there.  In the end, it doesn't matter where you go. Don't stress about it ❤️
author: @abbyz9790

title: Social media sounds off on BTS teaser. See why it was met with criticism.
body: Wait, hang on. The world is in shambles, people are losing rights, wars are starting, countries are exploding, and we are fighting over if an animation is “historically accurate”!?!? Guys wtf!!!
author: @KT-21-edits

title: Social media sounds off on BTS teaser. See why it was met with criticism.
body:
Black woman , Howard Alum, and unapologetic ARMY here. There’s soooooooo much I want to say. But for now… I just want to say… BLACK ARMY .. enjoy the music and celebrate… this is complex. But… I feel the nod to HU was positive and respectful even if the execution on the animation side made people feel some type of way…. I’m not gonna pretend like this was erasure. IMP true erasure would have been not mentioning Howard at all. But, more importantly… folks don’t know BTS… they are reacting on what they see/hear/the KPop industry in general. That’s fine… but it shouldn’t distress those of us who have gotten to know the bad and see them constantly putting money in Black artists’ pockets and giving credit where it is due.

I bleed Purple and I bleed Black. Period. ❤💜🫰🏿
author: @Aw-247

title: Social media sounds off on BTS teaser. See why it was met with criticism.
body: While we're at it why don't we have Latto and many other black rappers take some "accountability" for all the vile racist lyrics they persistently write in many of their raps against Asians? With Latto saying, "Asians love the Dog on the dinner menu."  Stop with all the hypocrisy people. The B Fatigue is a REAL thing.
author: @Hqmptynpw

title: Social media sounds off on BTS teaser. See why it was met with criticism.
body:
I'm sorry, I'm not trying to be disrespectful but it's a really dumb hill to die on.. firstly they didn't create the video themselves..it's not like they were intentionally being mean spirited or "whitewashing" or whatever some of these people are claiming. And honestly if someone didn't point it out, no one would've noticed, not saying that makes it better but its something.
Second, its an animation depicting the history of "Arirang". The location was part of that history but it wasn't the focus of it.
And yes it is an HBCU and had predominantly black students, but didn't it have diversity among the students and faculty, not only white people, others too?? Which in a simple animation like this might be hard to portray, idk I'm thinking of possibilities here. And also they shared their music with the locals according to the story not just the students and it was recording by a white woman wasn't it, are we assuming the locals are predominantly black too??? Is it not possible that, the scene with everyone watching was just misconstrued, and it was just meant to show everyone who witnessed their music and not just the students? I mean it is just a short sort of scattered animation😅😅
This is just my opinion on the matter, if I'm wrong, I'm wrong...just saying if you look it up, it doesn't go into Howard much , just that they went there because it accepted them, I had to go deep to find out much else, which most people usually don't do. They either get their info from a short or a comment and jump on the bandwagon. The disclaimer also said it wasn't historically accurate, obviously since it was the boys assuming the characters and shifting from them making history to BTS of present day.
author: @TheSweetana1

title: Green Day - Good Riddance (Time of Your Life) [Official Music Video] [4K UPGRADE]
body:
When I was around 11 or 12 my uncle passed away ... My mom's youngest brother.. I suggested she play this song at his funeral and she did... He lived a fast life..
Rip uncle Mike....

I've always had great taste in music.. lol
author: @BAMCarter12

title: Green Day - Good Riddance (Time of Your Life) [Official Music Video] [4K UPGRADE]
body: I'm a teacher, and I'd like to dedicate this song to the class of 2020, who won't be able to walk across the stage in May. We're at a unique juncture in history, and we're all trying to keep our heads above water.  The next generation is yours to lead.......learn from some of the mistakes of our current leadership, and instead, use what's brought you this far: awareness, preparation, team work, and proficiency. Be safe, and a thousand congratulations to you all. Live well.
author: @yellaboy2617

title: Green Day - Good Riddance (Time of Your Life) [Official Music Video] [4K UPGRADE]
body: I’m 68, heard this song today and honestly, it brought a few tears to my eyes thinking about my youth and the fun I had.  I’m still a kid at heart and always will be.  Don’t take your youth for granted, it goes quickly..
author: @steelbat54

title: Green Day - Good Riddance (Time of Your Life) [Official Music Video] [4K UPGRADE]
body: Do you remember sitting through the final chords of a school assembly or a late-night graduation party, feeling that bittersweet knot in your stomach as everyone waved goodbye? How are you holding up now that "the photographs and still frames in your mind" are accumulating faster than you can keep track of, filled with old friends you haven't texted in years and versions of yourself you barely recognize? We used to hold on to the promise that "tattoos of memories" would never fade, and I hope that as you navigate the quiet, daily routine of adulthood, you can look back at every sharp turn your life has taken and know that every single mistake and milestone was worth it.
author: @CoreMomentsHQ

title: Green Day - Good Riddance (Time of Your Life) [Official Music Video] [4K UPGRADE]
body:
Brought my guitar and sang this to my Grandpa in hospice two days before he passed in the ICU. He reached for my hand after playing, squeezed it for a moment before falling to sleep again.

Was a song played in his memorial.

Won't ever forget this song; it brings me back to him when I hear it.

Thanks.
author: @SoulsLikeRy

title: Green Day - Good Riddance (Time of Your Life) [Official Music Video] [4K UPGRADE]
body: I first heard/played this song  when I was a teenager. I am 38 now. Life has been unpredictable. I love you all.

author: @cb-zc8dv

title: Green Day - Good Riddance (Time of Your Life) [Official Music Video] [4K UPGRADE]
body:
To all you kids out there listening to this … I was about 20 when it was released , great times , never imagined for a minute that one day I’d be in my 40’s
Don’t get me wrong I have an amazing life , married to a beautiful redhead , fabulous kids , all the trimmings , my point is , your youth is over in a
blink … grab it while you can , you’re old for a damn sight longer than you’re young , thats what this song says to me , and it’ll be played at my funeral , at 44 I’ve already had the time of my life with a lot more to come . Love from Liverpool
author: @shapoopy4784

2026: ✅

title: Steve Jobs' 2005 Stanford Commencement Address
body: I failed high school with the worst grades possible. After watching this speech in 2011 it made me do high school all over again and graduate with the highest grades in all subjects, got in to university and finished a master in architecture and now I'm working with my dream job as an architect.
author: @ShockinglyTesla

title: Steve Jobs' 2005 Stanford Commencement Address
body: “Your time is limited, so don’t waste it living someone else’s life. Don’t be trapped by dogma which is living with the results of other people’s thinking. Don’t let the noise of others’ opinions drown out your own inner voice. And the most important, is to have the courage to follow your heart and intuition. They somehow already know what you truly want to become. Everything else is secondary.”
author: @feliciaangkl

title: A Day in the Life of a Harvard Student
body: I think the craziest part of this ''Day in the life'' is that Josh comes home to two kids and a wife, which as a father/husband myself, I can attest that your day does not end at that moment, it's another world of parenting/ affection for your family. This is very motivating as I journey through my Schooling at Fort Hays State University, while I work full-time in Supply Chain. Hats off to you Josh, and all the other parents here going through this same type of adventure!

title: First Day at Harvard University #TheManniiShow.com/series
body: I went to a top university and this hit SO HARD. The expressions, the vibe, the unnerving music playing in the distance. Cryin. (In more ways than one)

title: Howard University: College Campus Tour Vlog
body: A little disappointed. This was just walking around looking at buildings. Commentary would have been helpful. What did you think of the campus? How were the dorms? Did you go on an actual tour because we didn't get to see inside of anywhere except the bookstore? You gave more info in your other college visits. Howard is a popular choice among HBCUs and some insight would be appreciated. Thank you and good luck with your decision!
author: @monicap9565

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: Wow, I’m thankful for you sharing your experience and I apologize that those experiences happened to you. God is blessing you and has His hand over you. I am looking forward on an update on your educational journey!
author: @thelifeofautumnj9855

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body:
I’m currently at Howard right now. I’m in my first semester as a transfer student. I got accepted into the school 3 weeks before the semester started and had to go in person to make sure I had housing. Howard definitely is interesting. It has its good and bad qualities. Hopefully while I’m here they’ll start improving more, but so far I like all the different activities, my classes, and the DC area.
I wish you the best in whatever you choose to do.
author: @YAY4Yolanda

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: Ive been saying this for years. Paying top dollar and getting mediocre services is completely unacceptable. The people that made it turn a blind eye because they made it out instead of shaking things up so the next generation can have a better experience. Things have not changed for decades
author: @AwolLottaWhoopass

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: Thank you for sharing your story. At the end of the day, greatness is within you. You're going to do well in life regardless. I see that in you.
author: @TheAdria.J

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: Thank you for your video. You've helped me to open up to hearing both sides of Howard before financially committing to the institution. I feel as though some fear has lifted toward understanding why people leave the university. It creates an understanding that no where is complete perfection, everything has its balance of positive and negative for some people. Your video was like a tranquil goodbye to Howard and a sincere vibe, so thank you. I hope that your healing from this experience allows you a peaceful transition into your next institution.
author: @diandrablake3372

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: She is NOT saying she expects a college to be perfect. She is saying something much DEEPER. She is ultimately saying to FOLLOW YOUR GUT on first impressions & to always KNOW YOUR WORTH regarding experiences you choose for yourself.

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: Great video young lady, you speak very clear & articulate. Speaking from a parent perspective you’re not alone.  So many students fell threw the cracks during that time & still having issues at these so called prestigious collie& institutions.  My son always have to go on a mission to find courses to fulfill his full time credit requirement.  Ik this is an old video, I hope you were able to get into another school of your liking to graduate.
author: @robinestcee9232

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: ONE OF MY CHILDREN ATTENDED, AND GRADUATED FROM THE UNIVERSITY OF SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA. SHE EXPERIENCED SOME OF THE SAME PROBLEMS. HBCU, OR PWI, NO UNIVERSITY IS PERFECT!
author: @Impex7

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: This video is definitely helpful towards me narrowing down my decision on where I want to spend my undergrad at for premed. And honestly don’t want the problems. It’s already a lot trying to study and get good grades clinical hours and experience, shadowing, research hours and the whole nine yards PLUS the debt. Definitely think I’ll be a better fit someone else.
author: @Suziwithoutapaddle

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: I matriculated into Howard University in the Fall of 1980.   Had no housing, but  I did acquire housing in the Wheatley Dorm. ie. the QUAD, after a week into the semester. I was accepted into LTHE College of Liberal Arts, I wanted to study Chemical Engineering. Tuition was about $3000/semester.... Financial aid issues....very hard school.
author: @scratcherscratcher11

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: literally just toured and had similar experience. Praying my daughter chooses XULA but will pay for wherever she chooses to give her the experience she wants.

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: You spoke your truth and honestly the school should be ashamed.... they don't have enough course offerings and you are penalized....unacceptable
author: @cmke1662

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: Very constructive review. I love that you were very honest and did not bash the school, shows your maturity and passion for having administration look into things. My son goes to Howard and I have been navigating some issues with him also... same as I did for my son that went to FAMU. I went to a PWI and had similar issues but not as I see them now. I applaud you young lady for this very eloquent and constructive review. All the best
author: @fiolinab9023

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: I went to HU 37 years ago and the Administration SUCKED .. I sent my daughter to HU in 2021 and the Administration still SUCKS … my daughter and I were so frustrated after her first semester that we talked about transferring… I felt they were disrespecting my hard-earned money and disrespecting my brilliant, motivated child (and other students as well)  … i.e multiple internet shutdowns, no COVID quarantine protocol for COVID positive roommate, mice in dining areas, low-quality food, unable to register because of HU error, flooding in dorm, mold in dorm,  multiple classes cancelled without notice, impacted classroom sizes, etc. .. HOWEVER, the student body rocks, the professors that she’s had rock, the course material rocks, DC rocks… I’m glad she chose to stick it out, second semester was far better than first semester… good luck to you!
author: @1systa

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: For those discrediting her experience, I go to GMU and have never waited for anything. Someone ALWAYS answers my calls or emails as they should.
author: @RessurrectionGraves

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: I hope you find happiness wherever you go to college. Find what works for you.  I went and I couldn't have been happier with the experience.  Honestly, I believe some of what you experienced was due to the pandemic.  Some of the disorganization was experienced by many schools (PWI and HBCUs). As far as friends, I didn't make serious, intellectual friends until my Junior/Senior year.  The first year was pure survival - keeping up with studies. The second year was keeping up with studies and trying to balance working. By third year, you know more but still work hard. You find a way to incorporate friends into your life. You're not there to party but friendships will develop. Last thought on this... I never got a mug or any special gifts during my tour. I didn't expect any. I wanted to see if I felt comfortable on campus. It felt like 'home' and I couldn't have been prouder of the decision.
author: @theninjacat7200

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: My daughter is there now and she is in full tears daily and want to leave. Administration sucks, no body knows anything about anything.  Websites links don't work.  Phones unanswered. Teachers scattered,  curriculum is unknown and not existing. They do, however notify of crimes.
author: @wowandwow9691

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: Dang… that’s really messed up. They know everyone is having at least one struggle dealing with this pandemic… they should have been more helpful. At the same time sometimes we have to Thank God for the delays because it means he’s preparing is for better. Wishing you all the best in your journey.

title: The Truth About Howard University & Why I Left
body: Thank you for sharing.  I know people don't want to hear the truth but the issues that exists are NOT acceptable. Especially the nasty attitudes from administration, inability to reach financial aid...etc...

title: HOWARD UNIVERSITY CAMPUS TOUR | 2022 Campus Guide
body: Wow. Howard has changed so much in a short period. I was there 07-11. Those new dorms werent around. We had drew meridian quad annex cook and towers. You just cant beat HU and that inclusive space. Truly a space for us.

title: HOWARD UNIVERSITY CAMPUS TOUR | 2022 Campus Guide
body: I just got accepted to Howard University last night, and it still feels so surreal that I can even say that I got accepted! I visited the school there times in middle school, and I watched so many Youtube videos since I was in 8th grade. Still waiting for that financial aid package, so hopefully, they come through with something good! I've also been subscribed to this channel since I was a Sophomore, and I watched all your Howard content and loved it. It is just crazy that I am watching some of these videos over again now that I have been accepted and might possibly attend in the Fall.

author: @LaurenSimonef

title: HOWARD UNIVERSITY CAMPUS TOUR | 2022 Campus Guide
body: Nice tour. My nephew Pryce just graduated and his brother Reign is currently a frosh. I quiz them on the history of campus ( 75-79 alum ) suggestion : A building ( Administration building ) is the Mordecai Wyatt Johnson building. The Valley : nicknamed Death Valley because of the difficult science classes. Douglas Hall : Named for Frederick Douglas. Even the founder General Oliver O. Howard deserves mention etc. Students sometimes spend 4 years on campus with little knowledge of the campus’ history. All in all I love the tour. I can still remember when the Blackburn Center was completed my sophomore year ‘76-77. Seems like yesterday. HU! You Know!
author: @AW-de3li

title: HOWARD UNIVERSITY CAMPUS TOUR | 2022 Campus Guide
body:
Thank you for the video. It brings back some good memories when I studied there. I graduated in 1993. There are few changes on the campus.
HU my unforgettable Alma Mater.

author: @stevotrillo

title: Howard University Campus [4K] Walking Tour (Washington, D.C.) 2021
body: I am surprised you didn’t show the medical and dental schools . You passed right by them on your left  as you approached Georgia Avenue and made that left turn headed to Howard university Hospital. Lots of history in those adjoining buildings like Dr. Charles Drew’s ground breaking work in blood banks and transfusions from Howard Medical and Dr. Gene Sinkford, the first female dean of a US dental school of any racial or ethnic group.
author: @davidfoley726
